rows.label: tlk45200111_05_msg0001
rows.name:
I saw the World Tree light
up like a big bright lamp!

rows.label: tlk45200111_05_msg0002
rows.name:
It happened just when Divine
Beast-san went past it. I wonder
if that happens every time?

rows.label: tlk45200111_05_msg0003
rows.name:
If a huge tree like that fell over,
the funny creatures in the Cloud Sea
would get a really big surprise, huh!

rows.label: tlk45200111_05_msg0004
rows.name:
But Mummy said the World Tree is
sturdy, so it should be all right.
I hope she's right...
